=== STEP 64 ===

--- REQUEST ---
FIND_FILE_RESULT: No files matching '*usr.bin/biff/Makefile.depend*'

--- RESPONSE ---


Let me try removing the Makefile.depend which might be interfering:

ACTION: EDIT_FILE usr.bin/rwho/Makefile.depend
OLD:
<<<
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/protocols \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcapsicum \
	lib/libcasper/libcasper \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif
>>>
NEW:
<<<
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/protocols \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcapsicum \
	lib/libcasper/libcasper \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif
>>>
